mapper.select: SELECT CHAMP_NO AS champNo, CHAMP_NAME AS champName, CHAMP_POSITION AS champPosition, CHAMP_ROLES AS champRoles, CHAMP_IMG AS champImg FROM CHAMP_INFO ORDER BY CHAMP_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAMP_INFO ( CHAMP_NO, CHAMP_NAME, CHAMP_POSITION, CHAMP_ROLES, CHAMP_IMG ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAMP_NO.NEXTVAL, #{champName}, #{champPosition}, #{champRoles}, #{champImg} )
mapper.select: SELECT CHAMP_NO as champNo, CHAMP_NAME as champName, CHAMP_IMG as champImg, CASE WHEN LOWER(CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%assassin%' THEN '암살자' WHEN LOWER(CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%fighter%' THEN '전사' WHEN LOWER(CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%mage%' THEN '마법사' WHEN LOWER(CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%marksman%' THEN '원거리 딜러' WHEN LOWER(CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%support%' THEN '서포터' WHEN LOWER(CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%tank%' THEN '탱커' ELSE CHAMP_POSITION END as champPosition FROM CHAMP_INFO WHERE CHAMP_NO = #{champNo}
